NO_TILES.title: No tiles placed
NO_TILES.description: Please place at least one tile on the board.

NOT_IN_LINE.title: Invalid placement
NOT_IN_LINE.description: Tiles must be placed in a straight horizontal or vertical line.

GAP_NOT_FILLED.title: Invalid gap
GAP_NOT_FILLED.description: Tiles must connect to existing tiles and be placed contiguously (no gaps).

NOT_CONNECTED.title: Not connected
NOT_CONNECTED.description: Your word must connect to the existing board.

OUT_OF_BOUNDS.title: Invalid placement
OUT_OF_BOUNDS.description: One or more tiles were placed outside the board boundaries.

CELL_OCCUPIED.title: Cell occupied
CELL_OCCUPIED.description: One or more tiles overlap with tiles already on the board.

DUPLICATE_COORDINATE.title: Duplicate placement
DUPLICATE_COORDINATE.description: You placed more than one tile in the same cell.

failed.title: Connection failed
failed.description: Unable to connect to the server. Check your connection or try again later.

lost.title: Connection lost
lost.description: The connection was interrupted. You have been returned to the home screen.

failed.title: Failed to skip turn
failed.description: An error occurred while skipping your turn.
